case_title: GREGORY DINGLE VS. HANCY VASQUEZ SAMAYOA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-07-2024 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT IN COURT ON 6/8/23. PER THE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT, PROGRESS REPORT HEARINGS ARE TO CONTINUE AT 6 MONTHS INTERVALS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF 7/20/25 AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE 10/7/24 PROGRESS REPORT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AT WHICH TIME A JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED FOR THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $10,115 LESS ANY PAYMENT(S) MADE UP TO THAT DATE. IF THE PARTIES DO NOT APPEAR ON 3/29/24, A FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT HEARING WILL BE SET 6 MONTHS OUT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE
TRIAL RESET TO APR-20-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-15-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF GREGORY DINGLE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HANCY VASQUEZ SAMAYOA IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT IN COURT ON 6/8/23. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE 3/29/24 PROGRESS REPORT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AT WHICH TIME A JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED FOR THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $10,115 LESS ANY PAYMENT(S) MADE UP TO THAT DATE. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-07-2025 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT IN COURT ON 6/8/23. PER THE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT, PROGRESS REPORT HEARINGS ARE TO CONTINUE AT 6 MONTHS INTERVALS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF 7/20/25 AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AT THE 4/7/25 PROGRESS REPORT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AT WHICH TIME A JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED FOR THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $10,115 LESS ANY PAYMENT(S) MADE UP TO THAT DATE. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAY-04-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ SAMAYOA, HANCY
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DINGLE, GREGORY VASQUEZ SAMAYOA, HANCY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-29-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GREGORY DINGLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HANCY VASQUEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $10,115 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF IN 25 PAYMENTS OF $400 AND A 26TH PAYMENT OF $115. THE FIRST PAYMENT TO BE ON JUNE 20TH, SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS TO BE MADE ON THE 20TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE OF JULY 20, 2025. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE BY MONEY ORDER AND MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF; A FIVE-DAY GRACE PERIOD IS ALLOWED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE SEPTEMBER 29, 2023, HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AT WHICH HEARING A JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED FOR THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT OF $10,115 LESS ANY PAYMENT(S) MADE TO THAT DATE. IF THE PARTIES DO NOT APPEAR PROGRESS REPORT HEARINGS WILL CONTINUE IN THIS FASHION AT 6-MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL THE RESOLVE DATE AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MANI SHEIK; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-20-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT THAT RESOLVED DATE IS JULY 20, 2025. VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF GREGORY DINGLE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HANCY VASQUEZ SAMAYOA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
